top_signals.title: AIDAmar Cruise Ship Docks at Damen Shiprepair for Bottom Survey
top_signals.summary: AIDA Cruises’ vessel AIDAmar docked at Damen Shiprepair Rotterdam’s Botlek location for her annual bottom survey while carrying around 2,000 passengers on board.The vessel departed the German port of Warnemünde on July 3, for a five-night voyage, and entered the yard’s drydock number 6 on July 5.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The great AI data centre cover-up
top_signals.summary: Tech companies need to come clean about the mounting environmental fallout of their race to build more hubs
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kongsberg Maritime, BCIT Invest in Future Marine Innovation Simulation Centre of Excellence
top_signals.summary: KONGSBERG, Kongsberg Maritime, and British Columbia Institute of Technology (BCIT) announced an investment that will establish the Marine Innovation Simulation Centre of Excellence (MISE) in British Columbia. The initiative is designed to strengthen maritime innovation and skills development…
